profileParagraphs: Applied Electronics & Instrumentation Engineering undergraduate at Rajagiri School of Engineering and Technology with 3 years of experience in hardware design, embedded systems, software development, and VLSI, delivering 15+ projects in embedded C, Python, AI/ML, and IoT.
Founder of VirtusCo, a robotics-focused tech startup, and founder of Noviq, a web development studio building websites, Flutter apps, and AI chatbots for local businesses in Kochi.
